post.summary: login the user and return the token

parameters.name: Accept-Language
parameters.description: Choose the response language. Supported values: en, ar.

requestBody.description: User login information

200.description: Returns JWT token if login is successful

400.description: If the request is invalid or login fails

401.description: If the user is not found

post.summary: Verify the Two-Factor Authentication (2FA) code sent to the user's email.

parameters.name: Accept-Language
parameters.description: Choose the response language. Supported values: en, ar.

requestBody.description: User email and 2FA code

200.description: Returns JWT token if 2FA verification is successful

400.description: If the request is invalid (bad model)

401.description: If verification code is invalid or user not found

post.summary: Login with Google provider, if the user is logging in with google for the first time, a new account will be created for him and the email will be confirmed by default

parameters.name: Accept-Language
parameters.description: Choose the response language. Supported values: en, ar.

200.description: Returns JWT token if login is successful

400.description: If the request is invalid or login fails

post.summary: Registers a new user account

parameters.name: Accept-Language
parameters.description: Choose the response language. Supported values: en, ar.

requestBody.description: User registration information

400.description: If the request is invalid or registration fails

get.summary: Confirms a user's email address using the confirmation token

parameters.name: userId
parameters.description: The unique identifier of the user

parameters.name: token
parameters.description: The email confirmation token

parameters.name: Accept-Language
parameters.description: Choose the response language. Supported values: en, ar.

200.description:
Returns success message if email is confirmed.
It will send an email to the user email to notify him the success creation of his email with a front end login link: 
{frontBaseUrl}/Account/Login

400.description: If the userId or token is invalid or confirmation fails

post.summary: Resend Confirmation Email to the user

parameters.name: Accept-Language
parameters.description: Choose the response language. Supported values: en, ar.

requestBody.description: User registration email

400.description: If the user email is in Invalid format

post.summary: Initiates the password reset process by sending a reset link to the user's email address.

parameters.name: Accept-Language
parameters.description: Choose the response language. Supported values: en, ar.

requestBody.description: Contains the user's email address.

400.description: If the request model is invalid (e.g., malformed email).

429.description: If the rate limit for password reset requests is exceeded.

post.summary: (OPTIONAL) Validates the password reset token before allowing the user to set a new password.

parameters.name: Accept-Language
parameters.description: Choose the response language. Supported values: en, ar.

requestBody.description: Contains the user's email address and the reset token received via email.

200.description: Returns validation result indicating whether the token is valid or expired.

400.description: If the request model is invalid (e.g., malformed email).

429.description: If the rate limit is exceeded.

401.description: If the user email is not found or the token is invalid or expired.

put.summary: Resets the user's password using a valid password reset token.

parameters.name: Accept-Language
parameters.description: Choose the response language. Supported values: en, ar.

requestBody.description: Contains the user's email address, reset token, new password, and confirmation password.

200.description: Returns success message if the password was reset successfully.

400.description: If the request model is invalid (e.g., malformed email), or If the password reset fails to update in the database.

401.description: If the user email is not found or the token is invalid or expired.

429.description: If the rate limit is exceeded.

get.summary: Returns the top-level admin dashboard snapshot used by the landing page cards and chart.
get.description:
The response includes total users, properties, pending verifications, contract totals,
sales, revenue, new users this month, active contracts, and the six most recent monthly
revenue points used by the overview graph.

parameters.name: Accept-Language
parameters.description: Choose the response language. Supported values: en, ar.

post.summary: Generates and stores an admin analytics report file.
post.description:
Supported scopes are `Overview`, `Users`, `Properties`,
            `Contracts`, `Revenue`, and `Full`.
            


  `Full` exports are only available as PDF. When `Period` is `Custom`,
            both `FromUtc` and `ToUtc` are required and `FromUtc` must be earlier
            than `ToUtc`.

parameters.name: Accept-Language
parameters.description: Choose the response language. Supported values: en, ar.

requestBody.description:
The export request containing report scope, output format, requested period,
and optional custom date range when `Period` is `Custom`.

400.description: Bad Request

get.summary: Returns paged analytics report history for previously generated admin exports.
get.description:
`Year` and `Month` filter against `FromUtc` when the record has a stored
            period start; otherwise they fall back to the report generation timestamp.
            


            Page numbers lower than 1 are normalized to 1. Page sizes lower than 1 are normalized
            to 20. Page sizes above 100 are clamped to 100.

parameters.name: Accept-Language
parameters.description: Choose the response language. Supported values: en, ar.

get.summary: Returns metadata for a single generated analytics report.

parameters.name: reportId
parameters.description: The analytics report identifier.

parameters.name: Accept-Language
parameters.description: Choose the response language. Supported values: en, ar.

get.summary: Downloads a previously generated analytics report file.
get.description:
Returns the stored PDF or CSV file bytes. A 404 is returned if the database record
exists but the physical file is missing from disk.

parameters.name: reportId
parameters.description: The analytics report identifier.

parameters.name: Accept-Language
parameters.description: Choose the response language. Supported values: en, ar.

get.summary: Returns detailed user statistics and a paged user table for the selected period.
get.description:
Search matches the user's full name and email address. The result includes summary counts,
status breakdowns, role breakdowns, a time series of user creation counts, and a paged table.
In this stage, `Period` is a string and supports `allTime`, `thisMonth`,
`thisYear`, and `custom`.

parameters.name: Accept-Language
parameters.description: Choose the response language. Supported values: en, ar.

400.description: Bad Request

get.summary: Returns detailed property statistics and a paged property table for the selected period.
get.description:
Search matches property title, address, and owner full name. Governorate filtering compares
the request value to the stored `State` field case-insensitively.

parameters.name: Accept-Language
parameters.description: Choose the response language. Supported values: en, ar.

400.description: Bad Request

get.summary:
Returns a deep admin view of a single property, including owner info, media, amenities,
comments, ratings, contracts, and booking requests.

parameters.name: propertyId
parameters.description: The property identifier.

parameters.name: Accept-Language
parameters.description: Choose the response language. Supported values: en, ar.

delete.summary: Soft deletes a property from the detailed properties admin area.
delete.description:
This reuses the existing property soft-delete workflow, including the delayed Hangfire image
cleanup job that runs after seven days.

parameters.name: propertyId
parameters.description: The property identifier.

parameters.name: Accept-Language
parameters.description: Choose the response language. Supported values: en, ar.

patch.summary: Restores a soft-deleted property from the detailed properties admin area.
patch.description:
If the delayed Hangfire image cleanup job is still pending, it is cancelled. If the seven-day
grace window has already elapsed and the proof-of-ownership image was removed, the property is
restored in `Pending` status so verification can be resubmitted.

parameters.name: propertyId
parameters.description: The property identifier.

parameters.name: Accept-Language
parameters.description: Choose the response language. Supported values: en, ar.

get.summary: Returns detailed contract statistics and a paged contract table for the selected period.
get.description:
Search matches the contract ID, property title, owner full name, and renter full name.
The response includes total contract value, status breakdowns, and per-row flags such as `CanCancel`.

parameters.name: Accept-Language
parameters.description: Choose the response language. Supported values: en, ar.

400.description: Bad Request

get.summary: Downloads the contract PDF for a contract directly from the admin detailed-contracts area.
get.description:
This endpoint reuses the core contract download flow. Admins can download by contract ID
without being the owner or renter.

parameters.name: contractId
parameters.description: The contract identifier.

parameters.name: Accept-Language
parameters.description: Choose the response language. Supported values: en, ar.

patch.summary: Cancels an active or pending contract from the detailed-contracts admin area.
patch.description:
The action is one-way. It cancels eligible contracts and attempts to cancel any issued
unpaid Stripe payment intents before the contract status is changed.

parameters.name: contractId
parameters.description: The contract identifier.

parameters.name: Accept-Language
parameters.description: Choose the response language. Supported values: en, ar.

get.summary: Returns detailed payment and revenue statistics for the selected period.
get.description:
Search matches payment ID, contract ID, property title, owner full name, and renter full name.
The response includes totals for payments, sales, platform revenue, owner payouts, a revenue time
series, and a paged payment table.

parameters.name: Accept-Language
parameters.description: Choose the response language. Supported values: en, ar.

400.description: Bad Request

get.summary: Returns the paged queue of users whose legal identity documents are awaiting admin review.

parameters.name: Accept-Language
parameters.description: Choose the response language. Supported values: en, ar.

get.summary: Returns the full verification payload for a single user review request.

parameters.name: userId
parameters.description: The user identifier.

parameters.name: Accept-Language
parameters.description: Choose the response language. Supported values: en, ar.

patch.summary: Approves a pending user verification request.
patch.description:
Only users currently in `Pending` account status can be approved. On success,
the account status becomes `Verified`.

parameters.name: userId
parameters.description: The user identifier.

parameters.name: Accept-Language
parameters.description: Choose the response language. Supported values: en, ar.

patch.summary: Declines a pending user verification request.

parameters.name: userId
parameters.description: The user identifier.

parameters.name: Accept-Language
parameters.description: Choose the response language. Supported values: en, ar.

requestBody.description:
Optional review payload containing a free-text reason. The reason is accepted and logged
but is not persisted in a dedicated audit table in the current implementation.

400.description: Bad Request

get.summary: Returns the paged queue of properties whose ownership documents are awaiting admin review.

parameters.name: Accept-Language
parameters.description: Choose the response language. Supported values: en, ar.

get.summary: Returns the full verification payload for a single property review request.

parameters.name: propertyId
parameters.description: The property identifier.

parameters.name: Accept-Language
parameters.description: Choose the response language. Supported values: en, ar.

patch.summary: Approves a pending property verification request.
patch.description:
Only properties currently in `Pending` verification status can be approved.
On success, the property status becomes `Verified`.

parameters.name: propertyId
parameters.description: The property identifier.

parameters.name: Accept-Language
parameters.description: Choose the response language. Supported values: en, ar.

patch.summary: Declines a pending property verification request.

parameters.name: propertyId
parameters.description: The property identifier.

parameters.name: Accept-Language
parameters.description: Choose the response language. Supported values: en, ar.

requestBody.description:
Optional review payload containing a free-text reason. The reason is accepted and logged
but is not persisted in a dedicated audit table in the current implementation.

400.description: Bad Request

get.summary: Returns the paged admin user-management table.
get.description:
Search matches full name, email, and phone number. Admin-role users are excluded from this
endpoint by design; they are managed through the role-management stage instead.

parameters.name: Accept-Language
parameters.description: Choose the response language. Supported values: en, ar.

get.summary:
Returns a full admin view of one manageable user, including roles, properties,
contracts, and payment summaries.

parameters.name: userId
parameters.description: The user identifier.

parameters.name: Accept-Language
parameters.description: Choose the response language. Supported values: en, ar.

delete.summary: Soft deletes a manageable non-admin user.

parameters.name: userId
parameters.description: The user identifier.

parameters.name: Accept-Language
parameters.description: Choose the response language. Supported values: en, ar.

patch.description:
Deleted users cannot be banned. The current account status is preserved in
`StatusBeforeBan` so that restore can return the user to the correct prior state.

parameters.name: userId
parameters.description: The user identifier.

parameters.name: Accept-Language
parameters.description: Choose the response language. Supported values: en, ar.

patch.summary: Removes a ban from a manageable non-admin user.
patch.description:
Only users currently in `Banned` status can be unbanned. Deleted users cannot be unbanned
through this endpoint. The restored state comes from `StatusBeforeBan`, not a forced
`Verified` fallback.

parameters.name: userId
parameters.description: The user identifier.

parameters.name: Accept-Language
parameters.description: Choose the response language. Supported values: en, ar.

patch.summary: Restores a soft-deleted manageable non-admin user.
patch.description:
This endpoint reverses the user soft-delete. If the delayed Hangfire image cleanup job is still
pending, it is cancelled so the stored media stays available. If the seven-day grace window has
already elapsed and the user's verification images were removed, the account is restored in an
unverified state so identity verification can be resubmitted.

parameters.name: userId
parameters.description: The user identifier.

parameters.name: Accept-Language
parameters.description: Choose the response language. Supported values: en, ar.

get.summary: Returns all identity roles known to the system with assignment metadata.
get.description:
Base roles such as `Owner` and `Renter` are marked as protected and not assignable.
Future roles such as `Moderator` appear automatically because the list is read dynamically
from identity roles.

parameters.name: Accept-Language
parameters.description: Choose the response language. Supported values: en, ar.

get.summary: Returns the paged role-management user table.
get.description:
Search matches full name, email, and user name. Unlike the user-management stage,
admin users are included here because admins themselves can be assigned or removed.

parameters.name: Accept-Language
parameters.description: Choose the response language. Supported values: en, ar.

get.summary: Returns a single user's role-management details, including available roles.

parameters.name: userId
parameters.description: The user identifier.

parameters.name: Accept-Language
parameters.description: Choose the response language. Supported values: en, ar.

patch.summary: Replaces the user's assignable roles while preserving protected base roles.
patch.description:
Duplicate role names are ignored. Unknown roles and protected roles in the payload
return 400. Removing the last remaining admin returns 409.

parameters.name: userId
parameters.description: The user identifier.

parameters.name: Accept-Language
parameters.description: Choose the response language. Supported values: en, ar.

requestBody.description:
The role-update payload. `Roles` may contain assignable roles such as `Admin`
or `Moderator`. `Owner` and `Renter` are preserved automatically.

400.description: Bad Request

get.summary: Returns the moderation queue with paging, breakdowns, and optional filters.
get.description:
Search matches report reason, reporter, reviewer, target IDs, and target-specific text
such as user names, property titles, message participants, or property-comment content.

parameters.name: Accept-Language
parameters.description: Choose the response language. Supported values: en, ar.

get.summary: Returns the full details of a single moderation report.

parameters.name: reportId
parameters.description: The report identifier.

parameters.name: Accept-Language
parameters.description: Choose the response language. Supported values: en, ar.

patch.summary: Reviews a moderation report and optionally applies one or more compatible actions.
patch.description:
Rejected reports cannot apply actions. Supported actions depend on the reported target type:
user reports allow user bans, property reports allow property deactivation and owner bans,
message reports allow message hiding and sender bans, and property-comment reports allow
comment hiding and commenter bans.

parameters.name: reportId
parameters.description: The report identifier.

parameters.name: Accept-Language
parameters.description: Choose the response language. Supported values: en, ar.

requestBody.description: Review payload containing the final report status, optional note, and optional list of actions.

400.description: Bad Request

post.summary: Sends a user message to the assistant. Creates a new assistant session when sessionId is null.

parameters.name: Accept-Language
parameters.description: Choose the response language. Supported values: en, ar.

400.description: Bad Request

get.summary: Lists assistant chat sessions for the current user.

parameters.name: Accept-Language
parameters.description: Choose the response language. Supported values: en, ar.

get.summary: Retrieves visible assistant chat history for a session.

parameters.name: Accept-Language
parameters.description: Choose the response language. Supported values: en, ar.

parameters.name: Accept-Language
parameters.description: Choose the response language. Supported values: en, ar.

400.description: Bad Request

post.summary: Adds a new booking request for a specific property.

parameters.name: Accept-Language
parameters.description: Choose the response language. Supported values: en, ar.

requestBody.description:
The booking request data:
- PropertyId: The ID of the property to book.
- StartDate: The start date of the booking.
- EndDate: The end date of the booking.
- PaymentFrequency: The preferred payment frequency for the booking.

400.description: If validation fails or duration is not divisible by the property's rental unit.

401.description: If the user is not authenticated or the user account is not verified.

404.description: If the property does not exist or is not active.

409.description: If the property already has active contracts.

post.summary: Starts a chat between the renter and owner regarding a specific booking request.

parameters.name: bookingRequestId
parameters.description: The ID of the booking request to discuss.

parameters.name: Accept-Language
parameters.description: Choose the response language. Supported values: en, ar.

200.description: Chat started and initial message sent successfully.

401.description: If the user is not authenticated.

403.description: If the user is not authorized to discuss this booking request.

404.description: If the booking request does not exist.

500.description: If sending the initial message fails.

delete.summary: Cancels or rejects a booking request.

parameters.name: bookingRequestId
parameters.description: The ID of the booking request to cancel/reject.

parameters.name: Accept-Language
parameters.description: Choose the response language. Supported values: en, ar.

401.description: If the user is not authenticated.

403.description: If the user is not authorized to cancel/reject this request.

404.description: If the booking request does not exist.

get.summary: Retrieves a list of active users that the current user has chatted with, along with their online status and unread message count.

parameters.name: Accept-Language
parameters.description: Choose the response language. Supported values: en, ar.

200.description:
Returns a list of chat-active users with their online status and unread message count. Each user object includes:
- Id: The unique identifier of the user.
- UserName: The full name of the user.
- ProfileImage: The URL of the user's profile image.
- UnreadCount: The number of unread messages from that user.
- IsOnline: A boolean indicating whether the user is currently online.
- LastMessage: An object containing the content and timestamp of the last message exchanged with that user.

401.description: If the user is not authenticated.

get.summary: Searches for users by username or email.

parameters.name: q
parameters.description: The search query string.

parameters.name: limit
parameters.description: The maximum number of results to return.

parameters.name: Accept-Language
parameters.description: Choose the response language. Supported values: en, ar.

200.description:
Returns a list of matching users with their online status and unread message count. Each user object includes:
- Id: The unique identifier of the user.
- UserName: The full name of the user.
- ProfileImage: The URL of the user's profile image.
- UnreadCount: The number of unread messages from that user.
- IsOnline: A boolean indicating whether the user is currently online.
- LastMessage: An object containing the content and timestamp of the last message exchanged with that user.

400.description: If the query is empty.

401.description: If the user is not authenticated.

get.summary: Retrieves the chat history between the current user and another specified user.

parameters.name: otherUserId
parameters.description: The ID of the other user.

parameters.name: Accept-Language
parameters.description: Choose the response language. Supported values: en, ar.

200.description:
Returns the chat history (list of messages) exchanged between the two users, each message with:
- Id, SenderId, ReceiverId, Content, SentAt, IsRead

400.description: If the other user ID is invalid.

401.description: If the user is not authenticated.

post.summary:
Creates a contract from an approved booking request.
Only the property owner can create a contract for their property.

parameters.name: bookingRequestId
parameters.description: The ID of the booking request to create a contract from.

parameters.name: Accept-Language
parameters.description: Choose the response language. Supported values: en, ar.

400.description: If the booking request is not in a valid state.

401.description: If the user is not authenticated.

403.description: If the user is not the owner of the property.

404.description: If the booking request is not found.

409.description: If the property already has active contracts.

post.summary:
Allows a renter to sign a pending contract.
This generates the contract PDF, computes its hash, and submits it to OpenTimestamps.

parameters.name: contractId
parameters.description: The ID of the contract to sign.

parameters.name: Accept-Language
parameters.description: Choose the response language. Supported values: en, ar.

200.description: Contract signed and anchoring process initiated.

400.description: If the contract is not in a Pending state.

401.description: If the user is not authenticated.

403.description: If the user is not the renter of this contract.

404.description: If the contract is not found.

409.description: If the property already has active contracts.

get.summary: Returns a single contract record by ID.

parameters.name: contractId
parameters.description: The ID of the contract to retrieve.

parameters.name: Accept-Language
parameters.description: Choose the response language. Supported values: en, ar.

200.description:
Returns the contract details:
- Contract status and ID
- Rental duration (formatted string)
- Property details (ID, name, address, price, etc.)
- Renter details (ID, name, email, profile image)
- Owner details (ID, name, email, profile image)
- Lease start and end dates
- Total contract value

401.description: If the user is not authenticated.

403.description: If the user is not the renter, owner, or an admin.

404.description: If the contract is not found.

get.summary: Downloads the stored OpenTimestamps proof file for a contract.

parameters.name: contractId
parameters.description: The ID of the contract whose proof is being downloaded.

parameters.name: Accept-Language
parameters.description: Choose the response language. Supported values: en, ar.

401.description: If the user is not authenticated.

403.description: If the user is not authorized to access this contract.

404.description: If the contract or proof file is not found.

get.summary: Downloads the stored contract PDF file.

parameters.name: contractId
parameters.description: The ID of the contract to download.

parameters.name: Accept-Language
parameters.description: Choose the response language. Supported values: en, ar.

401.description: If the user is not authenticated.

403.description: If the user is not authorized to access this contract.

404.description: If the contract or PDF file is not found.

post.summary: Verifies an uploaded contract file matches the stored hash.

parameters.name: contractId
parameters.description: The ID of the contract to verify against.

parameters.name: Accept-Language
parameters.description: Choose the response language. Supported values: en, ar.

200.description:
Returns verification results:
- Match (boolean)
- Message explaining the status
- Current contract status
- Current anchoring status

400.description: If the file is invalid.

401.description: If the user is not authenticated.

403.description: If the user is not authorized to access this contract.

404.description: If the contract is not found.

delete.summary: Cancels and deletes a pending contract.

parameters.name: contractId
parameters.description: The ID of the contract to cancel.

parameters.name: Accept-Language
parameters.description: Choose the response language. Supported values: en, ar.

400.description: If the contract is already signed or anchored.

401.description: If the user is not authenticated.

403.description: If the user is not the renter or owner.

404.description: If the contract is not found.

get.summary:
Retrieves recommended properties.
Authenticated users get personalized recommendations with fallback.
Anonymous users get top-viewed properties only.

parameters.name: Accept-Language
parameters.description: Choose the response language. Supported values: en, ar.

get.summary: Return all the notifications of the current user, ordered by created date (newest first).

parameters.name: Accept-Language
parameters.description: Choose the response language. Supported values: en, ar.

200.description: Return all the notifications of the current user contains id, type, title, body, data (optional), isRead and createdAt.

401.description: If the user is not authenticated.

parameters.name: Accept-Language
parameters.description: Choose the response language. Supported values: en, ar.

post.summary: Saves or updates the Firebase Cloud Messaging (FCM) token for the current user's device.

parameters.name: Accept-Language
parameters.description: Choose the response language. Supported values: en, ar.

requestBody.description: The request containing the FCM token.

400.description: If the token is missing.

401.description: If the user is not authenticated.

delete.summary: Removes the Firebase Cloud Messaging (FCM) token for the current user's device.

parameters.name: Accept-Language
parameters.description: Choose the response language. Supported values: en, ar.

requestBody.description: The request containing the FCM token.

400.description: If the token is missing.

get.summary: Return the renter dashboard data for this user for the authenticated user.

parameters.name: Accept-Language
parameters.description: Choose the response language. Supported values: en, ar.

200.description:
Returns the renter dashboard data for this user:
- Active rentals count
- Next payment info (amount, due date, is paid) for the next pending payment across all active rentals
- Saved properties count
- Unread renter notifications count
- Account status (verified, suspended, etc.)
- Collections of active rentals (Active rental card contains contract id, contract status, start date, end date, property title, address, primary image url, rental period, next payment amount, due date, is paid (if there isn't these three will return null)) if there is any active rentals.
- Collections of pending booking requests (Booking request card contains request id, request status, start date, end date,property Id, property title, owner Id, owner name, owner profile image) if there is any pending booking requests.
- Collections of saved properties (property card contains property id, title, address, primary image url, price, rental unit, type, average rating, ratings count, max occupants, bedrooms count, bathrooms count) if there is any saved properties.
- Collections of notifications (notification card contains notification id, title, is read, created at) if there is any notifications.
- Collections of personalized recommendations

401.description: If the user is not authenticated

get.summary: Return the owner dashboard data for this user for the authenticated user.

parameters.name: Accept-Language
parameters.description: Choose the response language. Supported values: en, ar.

200.description:
Returns the Owner dashboard data for this user:
- Properties Count
- Occupied Places Count
- Vacant Places Count
- Total Views Count
- Monthly Earnings (month, year, amount)
- Yearly Earnings (year, amount)
- Withdrawable Earnings
- On Hold Earnings
- Unread owner notifications count
- Pending booking requests count
- Account status (verified, suspended, etc.)
- Collections of owned properties (Property card contains property id, title, address, primary image url, price, rental unit, type, total views, average rating, ratings count, occupied places, total places, active contracts list which contains contract Id, renter Id, renter name, renter profile image) if there is any owned properties.
- Collections of contracts (Contract card contains contract id, contract status, expiry date, renter id, renter name, property id, property title)
- Collections of notifications (notification card contains notification id, title, is read, created at) if there is any notifications.
- Collections of pending booking requests (Booking request card contains request id, request status, start date, end date,property Id, property title, renter Id, renter name, renter profile image) if there is any pending booking requests.

401.description: If the user is not authenticated

403.description: If the user is not owner

get.summary: Return the personal profile data for the authenticated user.

parameters.name: Accept-Language
parameters.description: Choose the response language. Supported values: en, ar.

200.description:
Returns the personal profile data for this user:
- Basic Info ( Id, full name, email, profile image url, account status, date of birth, gender, country, member since, bio)
- Owner Data (is owner, average rating, ratings count, owned properties count, collections of owned properties which contains property id, title, address, primary image url, price, rental unit, type, average rating, ratings count) if the user is owner.
- Roommate Preferences (roommate preferences enabled, smoking, pets, sleep schedule, education level, field of study, noise tolerance, guests frequency, work schedule, sharing level, budget range min, budget range max) if the user is renter and roommate preferences enabled.

401.description: If the user is not authenticated

- Roommate Preferences (roommate preferences enabled, smoking, pets, sleep schedule, education level, field of study, noise tolerance, guests frequency, work schedule, sharing level, budget range min, budget range max) if the user is renter and roommate preferences enabled.

400.description: If the user is not found

get.summary:
Searches and filters property listings with sorting and pagination.
Anonymous users can use this endpoint. Authenticated users get saved-state on each card.

parameters.name: Keyword
parameters.description: Keyword to match against title, description, address, city, or state.

parameters.name: Latitude
parameters.description: User's latitude for distance-based sorting / radius filter.

parameters.name: Longitude
parameters.description: User's longitude for distance-based sorting / radius filter.

parameters.name: RadiusKm
parameters.description: Maximum distance in kilometres from the supplied lat/lng. Requires Latitude and Longitude.

parameters.name: City
parameters.description: Filter by city.

parameters.name: Governorate
parameters.description: Filter by governorate (state).

parameters.name: Type
parameters.description: Filter by property type (Apartment, House, Room, Villa, Studio, SharedRoom).

parameters.name: RentalUnit
parameters.description: Filter by rental duration unit (Daily, Monthly, Yearly).

parameters.name: IsShared
parameters.description: Only shared properties (true) or private (false). Null = both.

parameters.name: MinPrice
parameters.description: Minimum price (inclusive).

parameters.name: MaxPrice
parameters.description: Maximum price (inclusive).

parameters.name: MinBedrooms
parameters.description: Minimum number of bedrooms.

parameters.name: MinBeds
parameters.description: Minimum number of beds.

parameters.name: MinBathrooms
parameters.description: Minimum number of bathrooms.

parameters.name: MinMaxOccupants
parameters.description: Minimum max-occupant capacity.

parameters.name: MinSquareMeters
parameters.description: Minimum square metres.

parameters.name: MaxSquareMeters
parameters.description: Maximum square metres.

parameters.name: MinRating
parameters.description: Minimum average rating (1-5).

parameters.name: Amenities
parameters.description: Properties must have ALL of these amenities.

parameters.name: SortBy
parameters.description:
Field to sort by: Newest, Price, Rating, Bedrooms, Bathrooms, SquareMeters, Distance.
Default: Newest.

parameters.name: SortAscending
parameters.description: true = ascending, false = descending. Default: depends on SortBy.

parameters.name: Page
parameters.description: Page number (1-based). Default: 1.

parameters.name: PageSize
parameters.description: Items per page (max 50). Default: 20.

parameters.name: Accept-Language
parameters.description: Choose the response language. Supported values: en, ar.

200.description: Paginated list of property cards matching the filters

post.summary: Submits a moderation report against a user, property, message, or property comment.
post.description:
`ReportableTargetId` is parsed based on `ReportableType`:
            user and message reports require a GUID; property and property-comment reports require
            a positive numeric identifier.
            


            Message reports are limited to participants in that conversation, and users cannot report
            their own accounts.

parameters.name: Accept-Language
parameters.description: Choose the response language. Supported values: en, ar.

requestBody.description:
The report payload containing the target type, the target identifier as a string,
and the human-written reason for the report.

400.description: Bad Request
